english translation text: Dua’a As-Simat
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الْعَظيمِ الأَعْظَمِ
english translation text: O’ Allah! I beseech You through Your Name, the great, the most great,
the most majestic, the most magnificent and the most noble.

arabic text: الَّذي إِذَا دُعِيتَ بِهِ عَلىٰ مَغَالِقِ أَبْوَابِ السَّمَاءِ
english translation text: If You are requested therewith to open the closed doors of the sky...
...these will open with Your mercy.

arabic text: وَإِذا دُعيتَ بِهِ عَلىٰ مَضائِقِ أَبْوابِ الأَرْضِ لِلْفَرَجِ انْفَرَجَتْ،
english translation text: If You are requested thereby to remove the narrowness of the doors of the earth, they will be opened wide.

arabic text: وَإِذا دُعيتَ بِهِ عَلَىٰ العُسْرِ لِلْيُسْرِ تَيَسَّرَتْ،
english translation text: If You are requested thereby to make easy the difficulty, it will be made easy.

arabic text: وَإِذا دُعيتَ بِهِ عَلَىٰ الأَمْواتِ لِلنُّشُورِ انْتَشَرَتْ،
english translation text: If You are requested thereby to restore the dead to life, they will rise from their graves.

arabic text: وَإِذا دُعيتَ بِهِ عَلىٰ كَشْفِ الْبَأساءِ وَالضَّرّاءِ انْكَشَفَتْ،
english translation text: If You are requested thereby to remove misery and adversity, it will be removed.
I beseech You through the Majesty of Your person,
the Most Generous
and the Most Honoured One,
before Whom everybody bows down in submission
and all necks bend down in reverence
and all voices become humbled
and all hearts tremble; through His fear
and I beseech You through Your Might,

arabic text: أَنْ تَقَعَ عَلَىٰ الأَرْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِكَ،
english translation text: which prevents the heaven from falling on the earth except with Your permission,
and which controls all the heavens and the earth so closely that they cannot move away from their positions;
and I beseech You through Your Will, which the whole world obeys,

arabic text: وَبِكَلِمَتِكَ الَّتي خَلَقْتَ بِهَا السَّماواتِ وَالأَرْضَ،
english translation text: and through Your Word. By which You have created the heaven and the earth,
and through Your Wisdom, with which You have created the wonders,
and with which You created Darkness
and made it Night,
and made night the time of quiet and rest;
and with which You created Light
and made it Day,
and made day the time of movement and observation;
and with which You have created the Sun,
and made the sun gleam
And with which You have created the Moon,
and made the moon light;
and with which You have created heavenly bodies,
and made them fixed stars and planets,
and lamps for guidance at night, and as a means of decoration, and missiles for driving away devils,
and have created for them east and west,
and have created for them the places of ascendancy and orbits,
and created for them a firmament and sphere,
and fixed for them stages in the heaven
and how beautiful the stages
and shaped the stars and how beautiful the shapes
and made them stable through Your Name;
and from Your Wisdom You designed a system for them
and what a good system,
and controlled the heavenly bodies through the king of the night
and the king of day,
and through hours, making them a means for the reckoning of years and counting,

arabic text: وَجَعَلْتَ رُؤْيَتَها لِجَميعِ النّاسِ مَرْئىً واحِداً
english translation text: making appearance of heavenly bodies regular and universal.

arabic text: وَأَسْأَلُكَ اللّهُمَّ بِمَجْدِكَ الَّذي كَلَّمْتَ بِهِ عَبْدَكَ وَرَسُولَكَ
english translation text: And I beseech You, O Allah, through Your Glory, with which You addressed Your slave and Your Messenger,
Moses son of 'Imran peace be on him,
while he was in the company of angels
which address even the favourite cherubin could not ever hear,
above the clouds of light,
above the box of evidence,
within the pillar of fire
on Mount Sinai,
and on Mount Hurith
in the Holy Vale
in the sacred tract of land

arabic text: مِنْ جانِبِ الطُّورِ الأَيْمَنِ مِنَ الشَّجَرَةِ
english translation text: to the right of Taurus Mountain-through a tree;
and again addressed him on the soil of Egypt,
after showing nine clear signs
and on the day You split the sea for the Children of Israel,

arabic text: وَفِي الْمُنْبَجِساتِ الَّتي صَنَعْتَ بِهَا الْعَجائِبَ
english translation text: and caused springs to flow from a stone, thereby displaying wonders of Your might
in a deep sea;

arabic text: وَعَقَدْتَ ماءَ الْبَحْرِ في قَلْبِ الْغَمْرِ كَالْحِجارَةِ،
english translation text: and on the day when You solidified the water of the sea in the midst of the storm,
and caused the Children of Israel to pass by it,

arabic text: وَتَمَّتْ كَلِمَتُكَ الْحُسْنىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ بِما صَبَرُوا
english translation text: and fulfilled Your excellent promises made to them because of their calmly endurance,
and made them the inheritors of the East and the West in the earth,
wherein there are blessings for all the worlds;

arabic text: وَأَغْرَقْتَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجُنُودَهُ وَمَراكِبَهُ فِي الْيَمِّ،
english translation text: and You drowned Pharaoh and his armies and boats in the water.
And (I beseech You) through Your name, which is the most great,
the most majestic, the most magnificent, the most noble;

arabic text: وَبِمَجْدِكَ الَّذِي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِمُوسىٰ كَلِيمِكَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ
english translation text: and through Your glory, with which You revealed light to Moses, Your addressee, peace be on him...
...on Mount Sinai;

arabic text: وَلإِبْرَاهِيْمَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ خَلِيْلِكَ مِنْ قَبْلُ فِيْ مَسْجِدِ الْخَيْفِ،
english translation text: and earlier radiated the light for Abraham, Your sincere friend peace be on him, in the mosque of al-Khayf;

arabic text: وَلإِسْحاقَ صَفِيّـِكَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ في بِئْرِ شِيَعٍ
english translation text: and for Isaac, Your chosen Prophet, peace be on him, in the well of shiay',

arabic text: وَلِيَعْقُوبَ نَبِيّـِكَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ في بَيْتِ إِيلٍ،
english translation text: and for Your Prophet Jacob, peace be on him, in Bayt iil
and through Your Glory, with which You fulfilled Your promise to Abraham, peace be on him;
and through Your Oath in favour of Isaac;
and through Your witnessing favouring Jacob;
and through the fulfillments of Your promise to the faithful:
and through Your Names with which You accepted the prayers of supplications;

arabic text: وَبِمَجْدِكَ الَّذي ظَهَرَ لِمُوسَىٰ بْنِ عِمْرانَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ
english translation text: and through Your Glory, which appeared to Moses, son of Imran, peace be upon him
in Qubbat al-Rumman;

arabic text: وَبِاياتِكَ الَّتي وَقَعَتْ عَلىٰ أَرْضِ مِصْرَ
english translation text: and through Your Signs, which appeared on the soil of Egypt
with great might and victory,
with powerful signs
and with the display of full command
and great power;
and with the affair of the perfect word;

arabic text: وَبِكَلِماتِكَ الَّتي تَفَضَّلْتَ بِها عَلىٰ أَهْلِ السَّماواتِ وَالأَرْضِ
english translation text: and with Your words with which You do a favour for the people of the heavens and the earth
and the people of this world and the hereafter;

arabic text: وَبِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتي مَنَنْتَ بِها عَلىٰ جَميعِ خَلْقِكَ،
english translation text: and through Your Mercy with which You bestow upon all Your creatures:

arabic text: وَبِاسْتِطاعَتِكَ الَّتي أَقَمْتَ بِها عَلَىٰ الْعالَمينَ،
english translation text: and through Your Power with which You dominate the worlds;

arabic text: وَبِنُورِكَ الَّذي قَدْ خَرَّ مِنْ فَزَعِهِ طُورُ سَيْناءَ،
english translation text: and (I beseech You) through Your Light, through fear of which Mount Sinai collapsed,

arabic text: وَبِعِلْمِكَ وَجَلالِكَ وَكِبْرِيائِكَ وَ عِزَّتِكَ وَجَبَرُوتِكَ
english translation text: through Your Knowledge, and Your Greatness and Majesty, and Your Unique Magnificence and Your Honour and (through) Your might,
which the earth could not bear,
and, for which the heavens bent down,
and the great depths restrained themselves,
and the seas and rivers became stable,
and to which the mountains made submission,
and due to which the earth became firm on its shoulders,
and to which all creatures submitted,
and due to which the winds breathed,
and the flaming fires were extinguished in their places.

arabic text: وَبِسُلْطانِكَ الَّذي عُرِفَتْ لَكَ بِهِ الْغَلَبَةُ دَهْرَ الدُّهُورِ
english translation text: And I beseech You through Your might, through which You have been known to be All-powerful for ever and ever,
and for which You have been praised in the heavens and the earth;

arabic text: وَبِكَلِمَتِكَ كَلِمَةِ الصّـِدْقِ الَّتِيْ سَبَقَتْ لأَبِيْنَا آدَمَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ
english translation text: and I beseech You through Your word, the Word of Truth, which became a blessing for our father Adam
and his generation;

arabic text: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكَلِمَتِكَ الَّتي غَلَبَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ،
english translation text: and I beseech You through Your word, by which You overcame everything;

arabic text: وَبِنُورِ وَجْهِكَ الَّذي تَجَلَّيْتَ بِهِ لِلْجَبَلِ
english translation text: and I beseech You through the light of Your Face, which when it flased on Mount Sinai
crushed it to pieces,
whereby Moses fainted and fell down,

arabic text: وَبِمَجْدِكَ الَّذي ظَهَرَ عَلىٰ طُورِ سَيْناءَ
english translation text: and through Your Glory, which appeared on Mount Sinai,

arabic text: فَكَلَّمْتَ بِهِ عَبْدَكَ وَرَسُولَكَ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ عِمْرانَ،
english translation text: and through which You addressed Your slave and Your Mesenger; Moses, son of 'Imran,
and through Your appearance in Sa'ir
and on Mount Faran
near Rabawat, which are clean and holy places,
when troops of heavenly angels were in rows,
and with the submissiveness of the angels praising You,

arabic text: وَبِبَرَكاتِكَ الَّتي بارَكْتَ فيها عَلىٰ إِبْراهيمَ خَليلِكَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ
english translation text: and with Your blessings with which You honoured Abraham, Your sincere friend, peace be upon him,

arabic text: في أَمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ،
english translation text: among the followers of Muhammad, Your blessings be upon him and his Progeny
and You honoured Isaac, Your chosen prophet,
among the followers of Jesus, peace be on them both,
and honoured Jacob, Your favoured slave,
among the followers of Moses, peace be on them both,

arabic text: وَبارَكْتَ لِحَبيبِكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
english translation text: and honoured Your intimate friend Muhammad, may the blessings of Allah be upon him and his Progeny,
among his offspring and progeny, and his followers

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ وَكَما غِبْنا عَنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلَمْ نَشْهَدْهُ
english translation text: O Allah! Just as were absent and didn’t witness these manifestations of Your glory,

arabic text: وَآمَنّا بِهِ وَلَمْ نَرَهُ صِدْقاً وَعَدْلاً
english translation text: yet we believed in their truth and justice, without having been eyewitnesses,

arabic text: أَنْ تُصَلّـِيَ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: So we beseech You to send Your blessings upon Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَأَنْ تُبارِكَ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: and honour Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhamamad,
and have mercy on Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhammad,
with the blessings, honour, and mercy
you sent and bestowed on Abraham and the progeny of Abraham.
Surely You are Praiseworthy, Glorious,
the Doer of what You will.
You are Powerful over all things
HAJAAT
O’ Allah
O’ Compassionate, O’ Kind
O’ Original Designer of Heavens and Earth
O’ Lord of Glory and Honour
O’ most Merciful of all the merciful
O’ Allah, for the sake of this prayer,
and for the sake of these Names
which no one can interpret,
the inner meaning of which no one other than Yourself knows.
Send Your blessing upon Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhammad;
and do to me what suits You

arabic text: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بي ما أَنَا أَهْلُهُ
english translation text: and do not do to me what I deserve
and forgive my sins
past and future,
and increase Your lawful sustenance for me,
and save me from the help of wicked men,
wicked neighbours,
wicked companions,
and wicked rulers
Verily You are able to do whatever You will,
and You know everything.
Amen, O Lord of the worlds.
Al-Majlasi narrated from Sayed Ibn Baqi’s ‘Almusbah’ that one should say after reciting Dua’a As-Simat:
O’ Allah For the sake of this prayer,
and for the sake of these Names

arabic text: الَّتي لا يَعْلَمُ تَفْسيرَها وَلا تَأْويلَها
english translation text: which no one can interpret,
the inner and outer meaning of which no one other than Your self knows.

arabic text: أَنْ تُصَلّـِيَ عَلىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: Send Your blessing upon Muhammad and the Progeny of Muhammad;
and give me the good of this world and the hereafter;
and do to me what suits You

arabic text: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بي ما أَنـَا أَهْلُهُ،
english translation text: and do not do to me what I deserve
and exact vengeance from …
Name your enemy then say:
and forgive my sins
past and future,
and forgive my parents
and all faithful men and women,
and increase Your lawful sustenance for me,
and save me from the help of wicked men,
wicked neighbours,
wicked rulers,
wicked companions,
and evil days
And evil hours,
and exact vengeance for me on everyone who hatches secret plots against me,
and on everyone who oppresses me
and seeks to do to me or my family
or my children or my brothers
or my neighbours or my relations among faithful men and women.
(seeks to do) injustice
Verily You are able to do whatever You will,
and You know everything.
Amen, O Lord of the worlds.
O Allah! For the sake of this prayer,

arabic text: تَفَضَّلْ عَلىٰ فُقَراءِ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ بِالْغِنىٰ وَالثَّرْوَةِ،
english translation text: grant wealth and affluence to indigent faithful men and women,

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ مَرْضَىٰ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ بِالشّـِفاءِ وَالصّـِحَةِ،
english translation text: and recovery and sound health to the sick faithful men and women,

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ أَحْياءِ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ بِاللُّطْفِ وَالْكَرامَةِ،
english translation text: and bliss and clemency to the living faithful men and women,

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ أَمْواتِ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَالْمُؤْمِناتِ بِالْمَغْفِرَةِ وَالرَّحْمَةِ،
english translation text: and remit the sins of, and have mercy on, the deceased faithful men and women,

arabic text: وَعَلىٰ مُسَافِرِي الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِالرَّدِّ إِلىٰ أَوْطَانِهِمْ
english translation text: and arrange the return home of all faithful travellers...
...with safety and gain.
Through Your mercy, O Most Merciful of all the merciful.

arabic text: وَصَلَّىٰ اللهُ عَلىٰ سَيّـِدِنا مُحَمَّدٍ خاتَمِ النَّبِيّينَ
english translation text: May Allah's blessings be upon our master Muhammad, the seal of the prophets,
and his Progeny, the purified.
and His peace be upon them plentifully
Sheikh Ibn Fahad narrates that it is recommended after reciting Dua’a As-Simat to recite the following:

arabic text: اَللّـهُمَّ إِنّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِحُرْمَةِ هٰذَا الدُّعاءِ
english translation text: O’ Allah I ask you for the sake of this prayer
and what was mentioned in it from names

arabic text: وَبِما يَشْتَمِلُ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ التَّفْسيرِ وَالتَّدْبيرِ
english translation text: and what it contains from meanings and design
which none other than You comprehend fully
that you do to me …
HAJAAT

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
